Descriptive Stats

Sofía Granados and Linette Page

2025-06-12

Last edited: Jun 12 2025 2:30am SG

1. Descriptive statistics

1.1 Histogram for ETV (time and number of incidents, color by actor faceted by type)

full_dataset |>
  dplyr::select(contains(c("year", "_jep"))) |> #types
  group_by(year) |> #time
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "jep", values_to = "num") |> #get column of count
  mutate(
    perp = case_when( #make perpetrator column
      grepl("Guerr", jep) ~ "Guerrilla",
      grepl("Param", jep) ~ "Paramilitary",
      grepl("State", jep) ~ "State",
      grepl("Other", jep) ~ "Other",
      grepl("total", jep) ~ "Total",
      grepl("Multiple", jep) ~ "Multiple"
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(
    type = case_when( #make violence type column
      grepl("Hom", jep) ~ "Homicide",
      grepl("Dis", jep) ~ "Disappearence",
      grepl("Kid", jep) ~ "Kidnapping",
      grepl("Rec", jep) ~ "Recruitment"
    )
  ) |>
  filter(!perp %in% c("Total", "Other", "Multiple")) |> #remove the total
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = num, fill = type)) + #plot count by year; type by color
    geom_col() +
    facet_wrap(~perp) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "PuOr", name = "Violence Type") +
  labs(
    title = "Victims by type and perpetrator, 1978-2018",
    caption = "Data from CEV - JEP - HRDAG",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Victims"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
## Warning: Removed 368668 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_col()`).

full_dataset |>
  dplyr::select(contains(c("year", "_jep"))) |> #types
  group_by(year) |> #time
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "jep", values_to = "num") |> #get column of count
  mutate(
    perp = case_when( #make perpetrator column
      grepl("State", jep) ~ "State"
    )
  ) |>
  filter(perp == "State") |>
  mutate(
    type = case_when( #make violence type column
      grepl("Hom", jep) ~ "Homicide",
      grepl("Dis", jep) ~ "Disappearence",
      grepl("Kid", jep) ~ "Kidnapping",
      grepl("Rec", jep) ~ "Recruitment"
    )
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = num, fill = type)) + #plot count by year; type by color
    geom_col() +
    facet_wrap(~perp) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(2003, 2011), color = "mediumblue", size=0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Victims of state-base violence by type, 1978-2018",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Victims",
    caption = "Data from CEV - JEP - HRDAG"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "PuOr", name = "Violence Type")
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
## Warning: Removed 134176 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_col()`).

full_dataset |>
  dplyr::select(contains(c("year", "_cnmh"))) |> 
  group_by(year) |> #time
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "cnmh", values_to = "num") |> #get column of count
  mutate(
    perp = case_when( #make perpetrator column
      grepl("guerrilla", cnmh) ~ "Guerrilla",
      grepl("paramilitary", cnmh) ~ "Paramilitary",
      grepl("state", cnmh) ~ "State"
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(
    type = case_when( #make violence type column
      grepl("forced_disappearence", cnmh) ~ "forced_disappearence",
      grepl("kidnapping", cnmh) ~ "kidnapping",
      grepl("massacre", cnmh) ~ "massacre",
      grepl("property_damage", cnmh) ~ "property_damage",
      grepl("mine", cnmh) ~ "mine",
      grepl("recruitment", cnmh) ~ "recruitment",
      grepl("selective_assasination", cnmh) ~ "selective_assasination",
      grepl("sexual", cnmh) ~ "sexual",
      grepl("terrorist", cnmh) ~ "terrorist"
    )
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = num, fill = type)) + #plot count by year; type by color
    geom_col() +
    facet_wrap(~perp) +
  labs(
    title = "Counts of violence by type and perpetrator, 1978-2018",
    caption = "Data from Centro Nacional de Memoria Historica (CNMH)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
## Warning: Removed 864641 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_col()`).

full_dataset |>
  dplyr::select(contains(c("year", "_fal_pos"))) |> 
  group_by(year) |> #time
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "fal_pos", values_to = "num") |> #get column of count
  mutate(
    type = case_when( #make violence type column
      grepl("forced_disappearence", fal_pos) ~ "forced disappearence",
      grepl("massacre", fal_pos) ~ "massacre",
      grepl("selective_assasination", fal_pos) ~ "homicide",
      grepl("sexual", fal_pos) ~ "sexual violence"
    )
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = num, fill = type)) + #plot count by year; type by color
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(2003, 2011), color = "mediumblue", size=0.5) +
    geom_col() +
    labs(
    title = "Victims of False Positives by type, 1978-2018",
    caption = "Data from Centro Nacional de Memoria Historica (CNMH)", 
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Victims"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "PuOr", name = "Violence Type")
## Warning: Removed 140914 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_col()`).

full_dataset |>
  dplyr::select(contains(c("year", "_State_jep"))) |> 
  group_by(year) |> #time
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "state", values_to = "num") |> #get column of count
  mutate(
    type = case_when( #make violence type column
      grepl("Dis_State_jep", state) ~ "Forced disappearence",
      grepl("Kid_State_jep", state) ~ "Kidnapping",
      grepl("Hom_State_jep", state) ~ "Homicide",
      grepl("Rec_State_jep", state) ~ "Recuitment"
    )
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = num, fill = type)) + #plot count by year; type by color
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(2003, 2011), color = "mediumblue", size=0.5) +
    geom_col() +
    labs(
    title = "Victims of State-based violence by type, 1978-2018",
    caption = "Data from Centro Nacional de Memoria Historica (CNMH)", 
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Victims"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "PuOr", name = "Violence Type")
## Warning: Removed 134176 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_col()`).

TODO: show data with outliers in a better way…

estimation_data |>
  dplyr::select(contains(c("_dh", "_cnmh", "_jep", "false_pos"))) |> #types
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "fal_pos", values_to = "num") |> #get column of count
  ggplot(aes(x = num)) + #plot count by year; type by color
    geom_histogram(binwidth = 2) +
    facet_wrap(~fal_pos)

1.2 Density plot for peace support

estimation_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = trust_plebi_yes)) +
    geom_density() +
    labs(
    title = "Density plot of peace support in 2016 plebiscite, by municipality",
    caption = "Data from La Misión de Observación Electoral",
    x = "proportion of 'yes' vote"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
## Warning: Removed 2 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_density()`).

rm(estimation_data, full_dataset)
